PLTR.headline: Geopolitical tailwinds + 56% revenue growth; Truist reiterates Buy at $223 target
PLTR.bull: US Army consolidated 75 contracts into a single Palantir deal — a model for future gov agreements driven by wartime urgency. Rosenblatt raised PT to $200.
PLTR.bear: Peter Thiel disclosed plan to sell 2M shares (~$280M). P/E of 240x leaves little room for error; some analysts have $50 targets.

stories.title: Truist reiterates Palantir Buy rating after investor meeting
Analyst revises PLTR target amid growing insider sale concerns

RKLB.headline: Neutron stage 1 tank rupture delays launch to Q4 2026; backlog doubles to $1.85B
RKLB.bull: Cantor Fitzgerald raised PT to $85 (Overweight) citing record revenue and doubling backlog. $816M SDA Tranche 3 contract cements national security role.
RKLB.bear: TD Cowen warns Neutron rupture raises execution risk. KeyBanc downgraded citing growth catalysts already priced in.

stories.title: Cantor Fitzgerald raises RKLB target on record revenue
Rocket Lab Stock Decline Analysis Post Earnings

APP.headline: SEC probe disclosed Feb 2026; AXON 2.0 e-commerce expansion drives 70% YoY rev growth
APP.bull: Wedbush, BofA, and Benchmark all cite e-commerce TAM as 5-10x gaming — a massive expansion. 82% EBITDA margin for full-year 2025.
APP.bear: SEC probe adds regulatory overhang. Oppenheimer cut target from $740 to $660; stock fell from $672 to ~$380 in early 2026.

stories.title: Why Wedbush Analysts Love AppLovin Stock Right Now
BofA reiterates AppLovin Buy rating on e-commerce growth

VRT.headline: Orders backlog surges to $15B (+252% YoY organic); Wolfe Research downgrades on valuation
VRT.bull: Analyst consensus: 34% annualized revenue growth through 2026, 61% EPS surge to $5.62. GB200 NVL72 lead supplier status cements AI infra moat.
VRT.bear: Wolfe Research downgraded from Outperform to Peer Perform. Insiders sold ~490K shares (~$104M) in past 3 months including EVP cutting stake 46%.

stories.title: Vertiv Share Prices Surge After Analysts Raise Price Targets
Vertiv (VRT) Stock Slides 3% Despite Analyst Price Target Upgrades

AXON.headline: AI software grew 40% in Q4; TD Cowen raises PT to $950; Q4 net income collapsed 98% YoY
AXON.bull: 125% net revenue retention + $7.4B bookings backlog. 27-30% revenue growth guided for 2026. RBC cites data moats as durable competitive advantage.
AXON.bear: Q4 net income collapsed to $2.75M from $135M a year ago. UBS cut PT to $570 (Neutral) — expectations now 'extremely elevated'.

stories.title: Axon Stock Soared After Earnings — Analysts Think It Can Gain Another 30%
UBS Adjusts Price Target on Axon Enterprise to $570

CRWV.headline: Securities class-action lawsuits filed; $66.8B revenue backlog; Bernstein Underperform at $56
CRWV.bull: Oppenheimer Outperform with $140 PT — 'distinct competitive advantages over hyperscalers.' 110% YoY revenue growth. $30-35B capex in 2026 signals hypergrowth confidence.
CRWV.bear: Multiple securities fraud lawsuits filed. Insiders sold $373M in shares. Bernstein Underperform at $56. HSBC Reduce citing rising interest costs and credit spread widening.

stories.title: Oppenheimer Issues Bullish Call on CRWV With $140 Target
Hagens Berman Analyzes CoreWeave $452M Q4 Loss & Securities Litigation

SPOT.headline: Operating income swung from €446M loss in 2023 to €2.2B in 2025; Wolfe Research downgrades on saturation
SPOT.bull: 751M MAUs — still only 3.5% of global population. Arete upgraded to Buy at $680. FCF reached €2.9B full-year. Q1 2026 guidance: 15% constant-currency rev growth.
SPOT.bear: JPMorgan cut PT 13% to $700 on royalty cost headwinds. Ad revenue fell 4% YoY in Q4. Wolfe Research downgraded citing 'full' revenue forecasts.

stories.title: Spotify Stock Is Down 28% This Year, But Analysts See 77% Upside Ahead
Arete Upgrades Spotify Technology to Buy, $680 Target

DDOG.headline: FY2026 revenue guidance missed consensus; MCP server tool calls up 11x QoQ; Buy consensus holds
DDOG.bull: 11x surge in MCP server tool calls QoQ. 2,000+ trial/paying customers for AI SRE agent in first month. Average analyst 12-month PT: $182-207 (43-60% upside).
DDOG.bear: FY2026 guidance of $4.06-4.10B missed consensus — multiple analysts cut targets. BTIG cut PT from $221 to $170. Forward P/S of 10x vs. 3.9x industry average.

stories.title: Baird Lowers Price Target on DDOG to $180, Maintains Outperform
Will Datadog Stock Sustain Growth on Rising AI Cloud Monitoring Spend?

KTOS.headline: MACH-TB 2.0 hypersonics targeting $400M in 2026; book-to-bill 1.3x; stock up 7x in 3 years
KTOS.bull: MTCR rule changes + DoD jet drone demand. $400M 2026 DRSS target from MACH-TB 2.0. Book-to-bill 1.3x with $1.57B backlog.
KTOS.bear: Trades at 120x earnings. FCF deeply negative through 2026. Thin profitability raises self-funding concerns as multiple programs scale simultaneously.

stories.title: Kratos Defense Soars on Strong Q4 Earnings & Drone Programs
Is It Too Late to Consider KTOS After Its 7x Three-Year Surge?

RDDT.headline: 46% six-month stock decline; Q4 ad revenue +75% YoY; $1B buyback announced; CTO sells $1.29M
RDDT.bull: Jefferies: RDDT revenue-per-user at 70% discount to peers. Q4 revenue $725.6M (+70% YoY), adj. EBITDA +112%. $1B share buyback. Consensus PT ~$235-251.
RDDT.bear: US time-spent down 10.5% YoY in Jan. GAAP operating losses widened. Simply Wall St bear-case intrinsic value: $38. CTO just sold $1.29M in shares.

stories.title: Reddit (RDDT): CTO Offloads $1.29M as Jefferies Remains Bullish
Forecasting The Future: 18 Analyst Projections For Reddit
